mapper.select: SELECT * FROM main_task WHERE task_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{mainTaskName}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task_breakdown (main_task_id, task_name, tag, task_detail, deadline, officer, administrator, admin_phone, create_time) VALUES (#{requirementForm.mainTaskId}, #{requirementForm.taskName},#{requirementForm.tag}, #{requirementForm.taskDetail},#{requirementForm.deadline} , #{requirementForm.officer},#{requirementForm.administrator}, #{requirementForm.adminPhone}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT breakdown_id FROM task_breakdown WHERE main_task_id = #{mainTaskId} AND task_name = #{taskName} AND officer = #{officer} AND administrator = #{administrator} AND admin_phone = #{adminPhone} AND tag = #{tag} AND deadline = #{deadline} AND task_detail = #{taskDetail}
